title: Bootstrap State
description: Schema for the Bootstrap State manifest: Cloud-Init snippets, base image registry, VM template registry, deployment provenance records, secret registry, DNS registry, service contracts, hardware requirements, and first-boot ordering.

cell_id.description: Stable unique identity of the Infrastructure Cell this bootstrap state belongs to

declared_at.description: Timestamp when this bootstrap state was last updated

host_identity.description: Proxmox host identity — discoverable by Tier 1 assessment or init-bootstrap-state.py

vm_defaults.description: Default values applied to all VMs unless overridden per-VM. User input at cell initialization.

storage_config.description: Proxmox storage identifiers — discoverable by Tier 1 assessment (pvesm status)

keepass_config.description: KeePass organizational conventions — user input at cell initialization

vms.description: Per-VM bootstrap manifest — one entry per managed VM

base_images.description: ISO and base image registry — authoritative source of truth for base images

templates.description: VM template registry — one entry per named Proxmox template

provenance_records.description: Deployment provenance records — one record per VM deployment event

secrets.description: Secret reference registry — KeePass paths only, never secret values

dns_registry.description: Authoritative hostname-to-IP registry for all managed VMs and services

service_contracts.description: Service contract declarations — interfaces provided and required per service

network_topology.description: Management network topology — single source of truth for gateway, subnet, nameservers, and interface. All network-config snippets are generated from this.

hardware_requirements.description: BIOS and firmware requirements that must be met before Proxmox installation

first_boot_order.description: Ordered list of VM names specifying first-boot provisioning sequence

name.description: VM name as configured in Proxmox

role.description: Functional role of this VM, e.g. forgejo, inventory, assessment-engine

template_name.description: Name of the Proxmox VM template this VM is cloned from

initial_ip.description: Static IP address assigned by Cloud-Init network-config on first boot

initial_hostname.description: Hostname set by Cloud-Init user-data on first boot

bridge.description: Proxmox bridge the VM's primary NIC is attached to, e.g. vmbr0

initial_user.description: OS username created by Cloud-Init, e.g. ubuntu

ssh_key_reference.description: Secret Registry ID for the SSH public key placed by Cloud-Init

password_reference.description: Secret Registry ID for the initial OS user password

extra_packages.description: Role-specific packages added to the base package list for this VM's user-data snippet. Used by generate-user-data.py.

workspace_path.description: Override workspace directory for this VM's runcmd. If null, uses vm_defaults.workspace_base_path + VM name.

user_data_path.description: Repository-relative path to the Cloud-Init user-data snippet

user_data_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of user-data content at time of last deployment

network_config_path.description: Repository-relative path to the Cloud-Init network-config snippet

network_config_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of network-config content at time of last deployment

vendor_data_path.description: Repository-relative path to the Proxmox vendor-data snippet, if used

source_url.description: Canonical download URL for the ISO

checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the ISO file, prefixed with sha256:

created_at.description: Timestamp when the Proxmox template was created from this ISO

included_packages.description: Packages pre-installed in the template beyond the base ISO

base_image.description: Name of the base image this template was built from

proxmox_template_id.description: Proxmox VM ID of the template, if stored on this host

additional_packages.description: Packages added to this template beyond the base image

tofu_workspace.description: OpenTofu workspace name used for this deployment

tofu_commit.description: Git commit hash of the OpenTofu repository at deployment time

template_checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the template used

ansible_commit.description: Git commit hash of the Ansible repository at deployment time

ansible_inventory_commit.description: Git commit hash of the Ansible inventory repository at deployment time

deployed_by.description: Operator identifier who performed the deployment

id.description: Stable unique identifier for this secret reference, e.g. pve01-root-password

description.description: Human-readable description of what this secret is

keepass_path.description: Full path within KeePass to the entry, e.g. Infrastructure/proxmox/pve01-root

owning_cell.description: cell_id of the Infrastructure Cell whose KeePass database holds this secret

required_by.description: Component identifiers that require this secret, e.g. host:pve01 or vm:forgejo

required_for.description: Operations enabled by this secret, e.g. ssh-access, ansible-execution

rotation_schedule.description: Human-readable rotation schedule, e.g. annually or on-compromise

recovery_path.description: How to obtain this secret if KeePass is inaccessible during recovery

hostname.description: FQDN or short hostname, e.g. forgejo.internal

vmid.description: Proxmox VM ID if this entry corresponds to a VM

role.description: Functional role, e.g. proxmox-host, forgejo, dns-server

provided_interfaces.description: Network interfaces exposed by this service

required_interfaces.description: Interfaces this service depends on from other services

startup_after.description: Service identifiers that must be running before this service starts

backup_job.description: PBS backup job identifier covering this service

secret_references.description: Secret Registry IDs required by this service

owner.description: Team or operator responsible for this service

protocol.description: Protocol name, e.g. https, postgresql, smtp

url_pattern.description: URL pattern for the interface, e.g. https://forgejo.internal

health_check.description: Health check method and path, e.g. GET /api/healthz

critical.description: If true, this service cannot start without this dependency

host_identity.description: Identity and role of the Proxmox host. Discoverable by Tier 1 assessment.

hostname.description: Short hostname of the Proxmox host, e.g. pve01. Discovered by: hostname(1)

fqdn.description: Fully-qualified domain name, e.g. pve01.internal. Discovered by: hostname --fqdn

proxmox_version.description: Proxmox VE version string. Discovered by: pveversion

vm_defaults.description: Default values applied to all VMs. Timezone and workspace path require user input at init; initial_user is the OS image default.

timezone.description: Timezone for all VMs, e.g. Australia/Melbourne. Discoverable from host: timedatectl or /etc/timezone. User may override.

initial_user.description: Default OS username created by Cloud-Init. Ubuntu cloud images use 'ubuntu'. Override per-VM in vms[].initial_user.

workspace_base_path.description: Base directory for infrastructure workspaces created by Cloud-Init runcmd, e.g. /opt. Set null to skip workspace creation.

storage_config.description: Proxmox storage pool identifiers. Discoverable by Tier 1 assessment via pvesm status.

snippets.description: Proxmox storage path for Cloud-Init snippets, e.g. local:snippets. Discovered: pvesm status (storage with snippets content type)

isos.description: Proxmox storage path for ISOs, e.g. local:iso. Discovered: pvesm status (storage with iso content type)

vm_disks.description: Proxmox storage pool for VM disks, e.g. local-zfs or rpool. Discovered: pvesm status (storage with images content type)

keepass_config.description: KeePass organizational conventions. User input at cell initialization — reflects the operator's KeePass database structure.

root_path.description: Top-level KeePass group path used as prefix for all secrets in this cell, e.g. Infrastructure. All keepass_path values in the secret registry are relative to this root.

database_hint.description: Human-readable hint about which KeePass database file holds this cell's secrets, e.g. homelab.kdbx

network_topology.description: Management network topology. Authoritative source for all network-config snippet generation. Changing any field here requires re-running generate-network-configs.py.

management_cidr.description: CIDR of the management network, e.g. 192.168.50.0/24. The prefix length is extracted for use in network-config snippets.

gateway.description: Default IPv4 gateway for all VMs on the management network, e.g. 192.168.50.1

nameservers.description: Ordered list of DNS server IPs injected into all network-config snippets

interface_name.description: NIC interface name inside the VM, e.g. ens18 for VirtIO in Proxmox. All network-config snippets are generated for this interface.

hardware_requirements.description: BIOS and firmware requirements that must be verified before Proxmox installation

vtx_required.description: Intel VT-x or AMD-V hardware virtualization must be enabled

iommu_required.description: IOMMU must be enabled for PCI passthrough

minimum_ram_gb.description: Minimum RAM in GB required for this deployment

minimum_cores.description: Minimum physical CPU core count required

minimum_storage_gb.description: Minimum total storage in GB required
